user.title: Sunsynk / Deye Inverter Setup
user.description: Connect to the Sunsynk cloud API. Separate multiple inverter serial numbers with semicolons (e.g. SN123456;SN789012). MFA is not supported on Sunsynk accounts.

data_description.serials: For multiple inverters separate with semicolons: SN123456;SN789012

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your Sunsynk email and password. Note: MFA accounts are not supported.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Sunsynk API. Check the API server selection and your internet connection.
error.invalid_serials: No valid serial numbers provided. Enter at least one inverter serial.

abort.already_configured: This Sunsynk account is already configured.

init.title: Sunsynk Options
init.description: Update inverter serials, refresh interval, or solar forecast settings.

data_description.latitude: Optional — defaults to your HA home location
data_description.longitude: Optional — defaults to your HA home location
data_description.panel_kwp: Total installed panel capacity in kilowatt-peak (e.g. 10.5). Leave blank to disable solar forecast.
data_description.performance_ratio: System efficiency factor accounting for wiring/inverter losses, default 0.80

error.invalid_forecast_config: Solar forecast requires valid latitude, longitude and panel kWp (all numeric, kWp > 0). Leave all three blank to disable.
